name: TYPO3
description: Open source enterprise CMS with extensive multi-site and multilingual capabilities

description.value: Open source enterprise CMS with extensive multi-site and multilingual capabilities

initial-release.comment: First public beta released August 2000; first stable release (v3.0) on May 24, 2002. Development started in 1997.

github-stars.comment: Approximately 1.2k stars as of January 2026. Main development happens on GitLab, GitHub is a mirror.

cms-type.comment: Traditional CMS with headless capabilities via EXT:headless extension

database-support.comment: MySQL/MariaDB primary; PostgreSQL and SQLite supported

api-type.comment: REST/JSON API via EXT:headless. GraphQL available through community extensions.

multi-tenancy.comment: Superior multisite support with unlimited websites in one installation

static-site-generation.comment: Can work with static site generators when used in headless mode

edge-deployment.comment: Self-hosted PHP application; no built-in edge deployment

content-types.comment: Custom content element types via TCA configuration

custom-fields.comment: Add fields via TCA (Table Configuration Array)

field-types.comment: Extensive field types including inline relational record editing (IRRE)

content-relationships.comment: File references, inline relational records, MM relations

nested-components.comment: Content blocks extension and inline relational records allow nested components

localization.comment: Excellent multi-language support with unlimited languages in one installation

content-validation.comment: TCA field validation with eval properties

embedded-interactives.comment: Custom content elements can embed any type of interactive content

draft-publish.comment: Workspaces provide draft, review, and publish stages

scheduled-publishing.comment: Built-in publish date and expiration with specific time scheduling

approval-workflows.comment: Workspaces with customizable stages (Draft, Review, Publish) and custom approval stages

audit-logging.comment: Backend log module tracks logins, changes, and errors

media-library.comment: File Abstraction Layer (FAL) for comprehensive media management

image-transformations.comment: FileProcessingService for resize, crop, and image optimization

external-media-storage.comment: FAL supports external storage drivers (S3, etc.)

video-support.comment: Native video upload and YouTube/Vimeo embedding

folder-organization.comment: FAL organizes files in storage and folder structures

role-based-access.comment: Sophisticated user group and role system

granular-permissions.comment: Field-level, page-level, content-type, and module-level permissions

sso-saml.comment: Via extensions (md_saml, miniorange SAML, etc.); not built into core

team-collaboration.comment: Workspaces enable team collaboration with review workflows

audience-restrictions.comment: Page and content access restrictions by frontend user groups

typescript-sdk.comment: PHP-based CMS; no official TypeScript SDK for API consumption

content-type-sdk.comment: Content types defined in PHP via TCA configuration

cli-tools.comment: Symfony Console CLI with cache, upgrade, extension commands

local-development.comment: Full local development with DDEV, Docker, or native PHP

webhooks.comment: System extension 'webhooks' added in TYPO3 v12

plugin-system.comment: Mature extension system with 5000+ extensions in TER (TYPO3 Extension Repository)

admin-ui-customization.comment: Extensive backend customization via TCA, PageTSconfig, UserTSconfig

documentation-quality.comment: Comprehensive official documentation with tutorials, references, and guides

frontend-frameworks.comment: Official nuxt-typo3 integration; Next.js templates available via headless extension

search-integration.comment: Built-in indexed search; Elasticsearch/Solr via extensions

preview-mode.comment: Preview mode in Workspaces for draft content

ecommerce-integration.comment: Extensions available for e-commerce (cart, shop systems)

analytics-integration.comment: Google Analytics and other tracking via extensions

ai-features.comment: Via extensions (T3AI); TYPO3 v14 building framework for AI integrations

response-caching.comment: Sophisticated caching framework with page cache, content cache, etc.

rate-limits.comment: Self-hosted deployment with no rate limits

free-tier.comment: Fully open source and free to use

pricing-model.comment: Free and open source; paid support and ELTS (Extended Long Term Support) available

commercial-support.comment: TYPO3 GmbH offers enterprise support, ELTS, and professional services

enterprise-features.comment: Enterprise features built-in; ELTS and professional support available
